steps.t: Reeve Ingbert is in the Mead Hall of Eaworth. You have come to Eaworth to learn what its people know of the Uruks you are seeking.
Reeve Ingbert is in the Mead Hall of Eaworth. You have feasted with Ingbert and now he is waiting to speak with you.
Corudan is in Eaworth. You have spoken with Ingbert and learned that the Uruks passed north of Eaworth, followed by the Third Marshal of the Riddermar…
